title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF EL NIDO, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6878 / 53 OG No. 17, 5522 (September 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1780, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF EL NIDO, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:
Barrio Villa Libertad comprising the sitios of Calelenday, Taolili, Boloc, Inigtan, Mepague, Matolatolaon, Dao, Batbat, Madacotdacot, Nasigdan, Semenled, Bancalen, and Cagbanaba.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
